title: What to know about nail fungus before using medicinal herbs
intro: Nail fungus responds well to certain herbal teas, including chamomile, calendula, and echinacea teas. Chamomile, with its anti-inflammatory properties, soothes irritation. Calendula contains antifungal compounds that combat nail fungus directly. Echinacea, known for boosting the immune system, aids in preventing future infections. Regularly drinking these herbal teas offers a natural, caffeine-free approach to maintaining healthy nails.
definition: Nail fungus, a type of infection caused by fungi, affects the nails, turning them yellow, brittle, and sometimes painful. The condition is not only unattractive but also poses potential health risks. It can cause the nails to thicken, making it difficult to wear shoes or perform daily activities. In severe cases, the infection can spread to other parts of the body, leading to complications. Thus, addressing nail fungus promptly is essential for maintaining good foot health and overall well-being.
